title: Notas sobre entrelaçamento e holografia
text:
1.1 Referências utilizadas
 [1]  [2]  [3]  [4]  [5]  [6]  [7]  [8]






[1] T. Nishioka, S. Ryu, e T. Takayanagi, Holographic Entanglement Entropy: An Overview, J. Phys. A 42, 504008 (2009).


[2] M. Van Raamsdonk, Building up spacetime with quantum entanglement, Gen. Rel. Grav. 42, 2323 (2010).


[3] M. Rangamani e T. Takayanagi, Holographic Entanglement Entropy, V. 931 (Springer, 2017).


[4] D. Harlow, Jerusalem Lectures on Black Holes and Quantum Information, Rev. Mod. Phys. 88, 015002 (2016).


[5] M. Headrick, Lectures on entanglement entropy in field theory and holography, (2019).


[6] E. Witten, A Mini-Introduction To Information Theory, Riv. Nuovo Cim. 43, 187 (2020).


[7] S. Ryu e T. Takayanagi, Holographic derivation of entanglement entropy from AdS/CFT, Phys. Rev. Lett. 96, 181602 (2006).


[8] S. Ryu e T. Takayanagi, Aspects of Holographic Entanglement Entropy, JHEP 08, 045 (2006).
